title: Pure Ores
description: Adds more ores to the game, giving you many options for awesome looking gear and blocks!
body:
![pureores-title](https://i.postimg.cc/Wbn7vd4X/pureores-title.png)
![page-split](https://i.postimg.cc/52y4yJKV/page-split.png)

## 📘 About this mod:



**Pure Ores** adds more ores to the game, giving you many options for awesome looking gear and blocks!

This mod is intended to be used alongside my other mods, which I'm calling "**micro-mods**". I aim to combat bloated, overproduced mods with my simplistic, segmented **micro-mods**. Curate your own features without editing confusing config files and disabling recipes. Check my profile to find more mods, and complete your pack!



![page-split](https://i.postimg.cc/52y4yJKV/page-split.png)

## 📖 What's inside:



**v2.0.0** - Full refactor, new blocks and items!

![pureores-items](https://i.postimg.cc/02xCFY9z/pureores-content.png "Pure Ores - Items")

![page-split](https://i.postimg.cc/52y4yJKV/page-split.png)

## ✋ FAQ:



**Q: Will you backport to any older versions?**  
**A:** No. I prefer to keep my attention on the latest versions.

**Q: This mod feels a bit overpowered/underpowered. Is there a config?**  
**A:** No, not at this time. The only config that exists is related to worldgen. If you don't like a mineral set or wish to make it more rare, use the gamerule command for that ore to reduce or disable it from generating. 

**Q: I don't like something about an item. Can I disable it?**  
**A:** I've added a configuration option for each ore to this mod, using /gamerule. Essentially, if you don't like a mineral, you can reduce its spawn chances or disable spawning entirely. Additionally, individual items can be "disabled" using a datapack to break the recipe. If you have a suggestion for a config option, please join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/X6AsDnqex6) and share your thoughts.

![page-split](https://i.postimg.cc/52y4yJKV/page-split.png)
#### **Leave a comment!**  
#### **Thanks for downloading!**
